titleStmt.title: SII 7.269: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 269. (A.R. No. 89 of 1901). ON A PILLAR IN THE JANARDANA TEMPLE AT YERMAL, SAME TALUK AND DISTRICT.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti[śrī .*] gaṇādhipatayē namaḥ .
śrīpiṁgaḷasaṁvatsarada vriści
kamāsa 30 neyalu Eṟa
¨rmāḷa janā¨rdhanadēvara śrī
pādakke tirumalarasarā da
mādaṁba heggaḍeyara Oḍaṁbaḍi
keyalli samasta halare sāvirāḷu
saṁmatadiṁdu Ā¨ryyabaḷiya pā
¨rmaṇasēnapane Aḷiya gaṇapaṇa
yiyū tanage puṁṇyā¨rthakke
kāraṇavāgi . vriścikamāsa saluva
saṁkrāṁtiya dinakke janā¨rdanadēva
ra Alaṁkāra saha raṁgapūjeye
nū hoṟagaṇa balikallatanaka sā
lunivēdyadiṁda yekaṁḍadīvige

mū siva ḷigū hoṟagaṇa
ḷisāvapeyaṁ bīdhi
yaṁṇegū nivēdyamuṁ
tī¨rthakke saha Ē�¨rppa ḍisida
Akki baḷa 5 hoddikeya lekka
da mūḍe 4 tupa māsa 1 kkaṁ hā
ḍa Ubhayaṁ
varuṣa 1 kke di 36 ṟa brāṁhma
ṇara jana 36 kke bhōjanakke kalli
da Akki mūḍe 1 Ubhayaṁ ba
ge 2 kke paḍuva bayala mūḍa
kaḍe kuduretimaralli baha A
kki mūḍe 5 mattaṁ siṁhamāsa
da dina Obba brāhma
kke celva Avarugaḷa maneya kke
ḷagaṇa bayala geddheyakki ba

hagēṇeya Akki baḷḷa 40 ra hoti
keya lekkada mū 2 . Idaṟiṁda brā
hmara chatrakke 1 mūḍeya kuḷima ka
ḍame 2 mūḍe Akige vriścikada vi
nāyakacaUtiya hōmakke
jana 12 ra dha¨rṁmma chatrakke sahavā
si ni¨rvva¨rttisida Alaṁkārapūje
hōma bhōjanakke muṁtāgi śrījanā
¨rdanadēvare Anugrahadiṁda śilā
śāsanadalli barasida Akki svaropa
mūḍe 8 . I dha¨rṁmmava mācaṁ
drā¨rka Uḷaṣṭu dinapariyaṁtara
tappade muṁde muṁde naḍava dē
śādhipatiyū sthānada ka¨rttaru ne
ḍasi nanage puṇyava māḍikoṭṭu
nikilā Uttamaru yī dha¨rṁmava
pālisikoṁḍu parimāḍisikoṁ
budāgi śrījanā¨rdanadēvara pādakke
Digital edition of SII 7.269 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
